task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the enrichment path uses a single batched `.in("id", generationIds)` query, returns early when no clips or no `generation_id` values are present, preserves prompt metadata on normalized clips, and extracts prompt text in the same priority order as `generationTransformers` (`originalParams.orchestrator_details.prompt`, then `params.prompt`, then `params.metadata.prompt`). `index.ts` now passes the enriched clips into `runAgentLoop`. The existing `selectedClips.test.ts` module passed before and after the change.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `enrichClipsWithPrompts` does one `generations` batch lookup via `.in("id", generationIds)`, returns immediately when there are no generation ids to enrich, uses `originalParams.orchestrator_details.prompt -> params.prompt -> params.metadata.prompt`, and `index.ts` passes `enrichedSelectedClips` rather than the raw normalized array into `runAgentLoop`.
